indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of any desk or table at sitting height is the primary barrier to setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: upholstered dining chairs
indicators.rationale: Dining chairs are not designed for extended computer use and lack ergonomic support.

indicators.name: formal dining tables
indicators.rationale: Formal dining tables are not suitable for extended computer use due to their height and lack of ergonomic support.

indicators.name: formal dining room layout
indicators.rationale: The formal dining room layout is designed for social dining and lacks the necessary setup for focused solo work.

indicators.name: formal dining room lighting
indicators.rationale: Formal dining room lighting is designed for ambiance and does not provide sufficient task lighting for computer work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is poorly suited for focused solo computer work. The absence of a flat personal work surface, the use of dining chairs instead of ergonomic seating, and the formal dining room layout all contribute to a low score for this activity.
